response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust production experience in routing, navigation, or distributed geospatial pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js work shows system-level aptitude, but the absence of modern C++ in commercial routing systems and limited evidence of fault-tolerant distributed systems design raises concerns about technical alignment.
strengths: Built and maintained open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated ability to work across stacks and pick appropriate tools for complex problems
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and system reliability practices across multiple roles
concerns: No visible commercial experience with C++ or Rust in routing, navigation, or geospatial tile pipelines
Limited evidence of distributed systems work (fault tolerance, consistency, service discovery) in production
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang; C++ experience is dated and academic (LabWindows)
